testcase.name: src.tests.test_fastAPI_aiohttp
testcase.error: src/tests/test_fastAPI_aiohttp.py:9: in <module> from fastAPI_aiohttp.fastAPI import app, SingletonAiohttp src/fastAPI_aiohttp/fastAPI.py:47: in <module> app = Sanic(__name__) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/sanic/app.py:330: in __init__ super().__init__(name=name) .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/sanic/base/root.py:43: in __init__ raise SanicException( E sanic.exceptions.SanicException: Sanic instance named 'fastAPI_aiohttp.fastAPI' uses an invalid format. Names must begin with a character and may only contain alphanumeric characters, _, or -.
